penalties.detail: 23% of declaration weight has no edges

adjustment.reason_zh: vendored 顾问把项目自身的一级模块 okio/(根命名空间即 okio)误判为第三方混入,真正的 vendored 内容(Linux 内核头)已 skip,属检测器盲区
adjustment.reason_en: The vendored advisory misflags okio/ — the project's own first-party module whose root namespace is literally okio — as third-party flooding; the genuine vendored content (Linux kernel headers) is already skipped

layers.name: FileSystem
layers.summary: 文件系统抽象与各平台实现 · FileSystem abstraction, paths, file handles, and per-platform implementations

classes.name: FileHandle
classes.description_zh: 对已打开文件的随机读写句柄,支持按偏移读写、截断与获取大小,并可派生定位的 Source/Sink。
classes.description_en: A random-access handle to an open file — positioned reads/writes, resize and size queries, deriving positioned Source/Sink streams.

classes.name: FileSystem
classes.description_zh: 跨平台文件系统抽象,统一读写、元数据、目录遍历与原子操作,屏蔽 JVM/POSIX/JS/WASI 后端差异。
classes.description_en: The cross-platform filesystem abstraction unifying read/write, metadata, directory listing and atomic ops across JVM/POSIX/JS/WASI backends.

classes.name: ResourceFileSystem
classes.description_zh: 把 JVM classpath 资源(含 jar 内条目)暴露为只读文件系统的实现。
classes.description_en: A read-only FileSystem exposing JVM classpath resources, including entries inside jars, as files.

classes.name: AssetFileHandle
classes.description_zh: 基于 Android AssetManager 的只读文件句柄,把打包资产暴露为 Okio 文件系统条目。
classes.description_en: A read-only FileHandle backed by Android's AssetManager, surfacing bundled app assets through the Okio FileSystem API.

classes.name: ZipEntry
classes.description_zh: 解析后的单个 ZIP 条目元数据(规范路径、是否目录、CRC、压缩/原始大小与偏移)。
classes.description_en: Parsed metadata for one ZIP entry — canonical path, directory flag, CRC, compressed/uncompressed sizes and offset.

classes.name: EocdRecord
classes.description_zh: ZIP「中央目录结尾(EOCD)」记录,定位中央目录以驱动归档条目枚举。
classes.description_en: The ZIP End-Of-Central-Directory record that locates the central directory to drive archive entry enumeration.

layers.name: Codecs
layers.summary: 散列/压缩/加密的 Source·Sink 装饰器 · Hashing, compression and cipher Source/Sink decorators

classes.name: HashingSink
classes.description_zh: 在写入数据时同步计算散列/HMAC 的 Sink 装饰器,结束后给出摘要 ByteString。
classes.description_en: A Sink decorator that computes a running hash/HMAC over everything written, exposing the final digest as a ByteString.

classes.name: HashingSource
classes.description_zh: 在读取数据时同步计算散列/HMAC 的 Source 装饰器。
classes.description_en: A Source decorator that computes a running hash/HMAC over everything read.

classes.name: CipherSink
classes.description_zh: 用 javax.crypto.Cipher 在写入时加密字节的 Sink 装饰器。
classes.description_en: A Sink decorator that encrypts bytes on write using a javax.crypto.Cipher.

classes.name: CipherSource
classes.description_zh: 用 javax.crypto.Cipher 在读取时解密字节的 Source 装饰器。
classes.description_en: A Source decorator that decrypts bytes on read using a javax.crypto.Cipher.

classes.name: DeflaterSink
classes.description_zh: 用 DEFLATE 算法压缩写入字节的 Sink 装饰器。
classes.description_en: A Sink decorator that DEFLATE-compresses bytes as they are written.

classes.name: InflaterSource
classes.description_zh: 用 DEFLATE 算法解压读取字节的 Source 装饰器。
classes.description_en: A Source decorator that DEFLATE-decompresses bytes as they are read.

classes.name: DataProcessor
classes.description_zh: 原生压缩/解压的流式数据处理基类,驱动 source↔sink 间的字节变换。
classes.description_en: The base streaming data-processor for native compression/decompression, driving byte transformation between source and sink.

classes.name: Deflater
classes.description_zh: 跨平台 DEFLATE 压缩引擎封装(原生 zlib / java.util.zip)。
classes.description_en: A cross-platform wrapper over the DEFLATE compression engine (native zlib / java.util.zip).

classes.name: Inflater
classes.description_zh: 跨平台 DEFLATE 解压引擎封装(原生 zlib / java.util.zip)。
classes.description_en: A cross-platform wrapper over the DEFLATE decompression engine (native zlib / java.util.zip).

classes.name: GzipSink
classes.description_zh: 在 DeflaterSink 之上叠加 gzip 头/尾与 CRC 的压缩 Sink。
classes.description_en: A gzip-format compressing Sink layering the gzip header/trailer and CRC over DeflaterSink.

classes.name: GzipSource
classes.description_zh: 校验 gzip 头与 CRC 并基于 InflaterSource 解压的 Source。
classes.description_en: A gzip-format Source that validates the gzip header/CRC and inflates via InflaterSource.

classes.name: Buffer
classes.description_zh: Okio 核心可变字节缓冲区,同时是 BufferedSource 与 BufferedSink,以分段链表实现零拷贝读写。
classes.description_en: Okio's core mutable byte buffer — both a BufferedSource and a BufferedSink — implemented as a segment linked-list for zero-copy I/O.

classes.name: Sink
classes.description_zh: 字节输出流的基础接口,数据汇的统一抽象(类比 OutputStream)。
classes.description_en: The base interface for a stream that receives bytes — Okio's analogue of OutputStream.

classes.name: Socket
classes.description_zh: 同时提供 Source 与 Sink 并可取消的双向连接抽象。
classes.description_en: A bidirectional connection abstraction exposing a Source, a Sink and cancellation.

classes.name: Source
classes.description_zh: 字节输入流的基础接口,数据源的统一抽象(类比 InputStream)。
classes.description_en: The base interface for a stream that supplies bytes — Okio's analogue of InputStream.

classes.name: OutputStreamSink
classes.description_zh: 把 java.io.OutputStream 适配为 Okio Sink 的桥接实现。
classes.description_en: A bridge adapting a java.io.OutputStream into an Okio Sink.

classes.name: InputStreamSource
classes.description_zh: 把 java.io.InputStream 适配为 Okio Source 的桥接实现。
classes.description_en: A bridge adapting a java.io.InputStream into an Okio Source.

classes.name: SocketAsyncTimeout
classes.description_zh: 为阻塞 Socket I/O 提供基于 AsyncTimeout 的看门狗超时与取消。
classes.description_en: An AsyncTimeout-based watchdog providing timeouts and cancellation for blocking socket I/O.

classes.name: DefaultSocket
classes.description_zh: 基于 java.net.Socket 的 Okio Socket 默认实现,封装其输入/输出流。
classes.description_en: The default Okio Socket implementation wrapping a java.net.Socket's input/output streams.

classes.name: PipeSocket
classes.description_zh: 由两个内存 Pipe 构成的进程内 Socket,常用于测试与本地双工通信。
classes.description_en: An in-memory Socket built from two Pipes, useful for testing and local full-duplex communication.

classes.name: FixedLengthSource
classes.description_zh: 限定可读字节数的 ForwardingSource,按声明长度截断或在不足时报错。
classes.description_en: A ForwardingSource that bounds how many bytes may be read, truncating or erroring against a declared length.

classes.name: ByteString
classes.description_zh: 不可变字节序列,提供 hex/base64/utf8 编码、子串与散列等操作,是 Okio 的核心值类型。
classes.description_en: An immutable sequence of bytes with hex/base64/utf8 encoding, substring and hashing helpers — Okio's core value type.

classes.name: SegmentedByteString
classes.description_zh: 共享 Buffer 段实现的 ByteString,从缓冲区快照不可变字节而无需拷贝。
classes.description_en: A ByteString implementation that shares Buffer segments, snapshotting immutable bytes from a buffer without copying.

classes.name: Options
classes.description_zh: 预编译的 ByteString 选项集(前缀字典树),支撑 BufferedSource.select 的高效多分支匹配。
classes.description_en: A precompiled set of ByteString options (a prefix trie) powering efficient multi-way matching in BufferedSource.select.

layers.name: Hash & Checksum
layers.summary: 散列、HMAC 与 CRC 校验的纯算法实现 · Pure hash, HMAC and CRC checksum algorithm implementations

classes.name: HashFunction
classes.description_zh: 流式散列算法的统一接口(update/digest),为各摘要实现提供抽象。
classes.description_en: The common interface (update/digest) for streaming hash algorithms behind every digest implementation.

classes.name: Hmac
classes.description_zh: 基于任意底层散列函数的 HMAC 密钥消息认证码实现。
classes.description_en: An HMAC keyed message-authentication-code built on top of any underlying hash function.

classes.name: Md5
classes.description_zh: 纯 Kotlin 的 MD5 摘要算法实现。
classes.description_en: A pure-Kotlin implementation of the MD5 digest algorithm.

classes.name: Sha1
classes.description_zh: 纯 Kotlin 的 SHA-1 摘要算法实现。
classes.description_en: A pure-Kotlin implementation of the SHA-1 digest algorithm.

classes.name: Sha256
classes.description_zh: 纯 Kotlin 的 SHA-256 摘要算法实现。
classes.description_en: A pure-Kotlin implementation of the SHA-256 digest algorithm.

classes.name: Sha512
classes.description_zh: 纯 Kotlin 的 SHA-512 摘要算法实现。
classes.description_en: A pure-Kotlin implementation of the SHA-512 digest algorithm.

classes.name: CRC32
classes.description_zh: 用于 gzip/zip 完整性校验的 CRC32 循环冗余校验实现。
classes.description_en: A CRC32 cyclic-redundancy-check used for gzip/zip integrity verification.

layers.name: Platform Backends
layers.summary: Kotlin Multiplatform 的 expect/actual 平台胶水与原生绑定 · KMP expect/actual platform glue and native bindings

classes.name: IOException
classes.description_zh: Okio 的跨平台 I/O 异常基类(JVM 上别名为 java.io.IOException)。
classes.description_en: Okio's cross-platform base I/O exception, aliased to java.io.IOException on the JVM.

classes.name: FileNotFoundException
classes.description_zh: 跨平台「文件不存在」异常,统一文件系统操作的错误模型。
classes.description_en: The cross-platform file-not-found exception unifying the filesystem error model.

classes.name: ErrnoException
classes.description_zh: 将 WASI preview1 的 errno 错误码转换为 Okio 异常的封装。
classes.description_en: A wrapper turning WASI preview1 errno codes into Okio exceptions.

flows.name: 缓冲写入路径 · Buffered write path
flows.description: 一次写入如何穿过 BufferedSink、分段缓冲区,最终落到底层 Sink · How a write threads through the buffered sink and segment pool down to a terminal sink.

flows.name: 缓冲读取与 select · Buffered read & select
flows.description: 从底层 Source 经分段缓冲区到类型化/前缀树选择读取 · From a raw Source through the segment buffer to typed reads and trie-based select().

flows.name: Sink 装饰器链 · Sink decorator chain
flows.description: 散列、压缩等 Sink 装饰器层层包裹,逐级转发至底层 Sink · Hashing/deflating sink decorators wrap and forward writes down to a terminal sink.

flows.name: 散列与 HMAC · Hashing & HMAC
flows.description: 数据流经 HashingSink/Source,由散列算法族计算并输出摘要 ByteString · Data flows through HashingSink/Source into the hash-function family, producing a digest ByteString.

flows.name: 文件系统读写 · FileSystem read/write
flows.description: 调用方经 FileSystem 打开 FileHandle,派生 File Source/Sink 与 Buffer 完成读写 · A caller opens a FileHandle via FileSystem, deriving File Source/Sink and a Buffer to move bytes.

flows.name: ZIP 文件系统解析 · Zip filesystem parse
flows.description: 打开归档、解析 EOCD/中央目录、构建条目索引,产出只读 ZipFileSystem · Open an archive, parse the EOCD/central directory, index entries and expose a read-only ZipFileSystem.
